name: signoz
description: A Pulumi provider for SigNoz. Manage SigNoz dashboards, alerts, notification channels, saved views, and log pipelines as code.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`signoz` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/jgautheron/terraform-provider-signoz).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi provider for SigNoz. Manage SigNoz dashboards, alerts, notification channels, saved views, and log pipelines as code.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/jgautheron/terraform-provider-signoz)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-signoz` repo](https://github.com/jgautheron/pulumi-signoz/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-signoz` repo](https://github.com/jgautheron/terraform-provider-signoz/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/jgautheron/terraform-provider-signoz)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-signoz` repo](https://github.com/jgautheron/pulumi-signoz/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-signoz` repo](https://github.com/jgautheron/terraform-provider-signoz/issues).

accessToken.description: SigNoz Service Account access token, sent as the `SIGNOZ-API-KEY` header. May also be set via the `SIGNOZ_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable. Required for any real API call.

endpoint.description: Base URL of the SigNoz query-service API (e.g. `https://signoz.example.com`). Defaults to `http://localhost:3301`. May also be set via the `SIGNOZ_ENDPOINT` environment variable.

httpMaxRetry.description: Maximum retries for transient (5xx / network) failures. Defaults to 3. May also be set via `SIGNOZ_HTTP_MAX_RETRY`.

httpTimeout.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 35. May also be set via `SIGNOZ_HTTP_TIMEOUT`.

provider.description:
The provider type for the signoz package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

httpTimeout.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in seconds. Defaults to 35. May also be set via `SIGNOZ_HTTP_TIMEOUT`.

condition.description: Query condition as JSON (compositeQuery + thresholds). Compared semantically.

disabled.description: Whether the rule is disabled. Defaults to false.

evalWindow.description: Evaluation window (e.g. `5m0s`).

evaluation.description: Evaluation block as JSON (v2alpha1+). Compared semantically.

frequency.description: Evaluation frequency (e.g. `1m0s`).

labels.description: Custom labels attached to the alert.

notificationSettings.description: Notification settings as JSON (renotify, group*by, use*policy). Compared semantically.

preferredChannels.description: Notification channel names the alert routes to.

ruleType.description: Rule engine type: `thresholdRule` (default) or `promqlRule`.

schemaVersion.description: Alert schema version. Defaults to `v2alpha1`.

severity.description: Severity label (e.g. `info`, `warning`, `critical`).

source.description: Source URL recorded on the rule.

version.description: Alert API version. Defaults to `v5` (required by SigNoz >= 0.125).

data.description: Dashboard definition as JSON (title, layout, widgets, variables, …). Compared semantically, so key ordering and whitespace don't cause diffs.
